guide.intro: Quick tips for getting the most out of the Styler Pipeline.
guide.tips.avoid_conflicts.title: Avoid contradictory selections
guide.tips.avoid_conflicts.body1: Don't pick styles that fight each other (e.g., "sunset warm light" + "cold neon sci-fi" + "noir low-key").
guide.tips.avoid_conflicts.body2: Fewer, consistent choices usually produce better results.
guide.tips.avoid_overstack.title: Don't over-stack too many styles
guide.tips.avoid_overstack.body1: Selecting many categories with similar heavy themes (e.g., 10 "cyberpunk" flavored picks) can overload the prompt and degrade composition.
guide.tips.avoid_overstack.body2: Prefer a few strong choices, then refine.
guide.tips.all_in_one.title: All-in-One is the strongest selector
guide.tips.all_in_one.body1: "All-in-One" is designed to define a complete look and often has more weight than individual categories.
guide.tips.all_in_one.body2: If All-in-One already gives the look you want, the rest can be optional fine-tuning.
guide.tips.iterate.title: Iterate intentionally
guide.tips.iterate.body1: Change one category at a time when debugging why results look off.
guide.tips.iterate.body2: If results become chaotic, clear most selections and rebuild from one strong base (often All-in-One).
guide.note: These are guidelines, not restrictions. Feel free to experiment—the styler won't prevent you from combining styles.

about.issues.title: Report Issues
about.issues.body: Report bugs, ask for support, or suggest new features via GitHub Issues. This is the project's main support and feedback channel.
about.issues.btn.label: Issues
about.support.title: Support independent open-source development
about.support.bullet1: This project is maintained using paid AI tools for development, debugging, and testing.
about.support.bullet2: When the AI usage limit is reached and more tokens can't be purchased, development pauses until the next billing cycle.
about.support.bullet3: If this tool is useful to you, your support directly funds more AI usage so fixes and improvements ship sooner without delays.

ai_styler.quick_start.title: Quick Start
ai_styler.quick_start.step1: Select the categories you want to query from the sidebar.
ai_styler.quick_start.step2: Choose the provider and model you want to use for the query.
ai_styler.quick_start.step3: If you don't have an API key, use Ollama (free and keyless).
ai_styler.quick_start.step4_before_key: Briefly describe the look you want, then click
ai_styler.quick_start.step5: The LLM will pick the best matching styles.
